message:
✨ Add weather info and clock to channels top bar (#63)

- Create WeatherService using Open-Meteo API with IP geolocation
- Create compact WeatherClockWidget (icon + temp + city | time)
- Add widget to channels screen top bar before action buttons
- Auto-refreshes weather every 30 min, clock every minute

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -505,7 +505,7 @@ packages:
     source: hosted
     version: "1.0.1"
   http:
-    dependency: transitive
+    dependency: "direct main"
     description:
       name: http
       sha256: "87721a4a50b19c7f1d49001e51409bddc46303966ce89a65af4f4e6004896412"

@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ dependencies:
 
   # Networking
   dio: ^5.7.0
+  http: ^1.2.2
 
   # Local database (SQLite)
   drift: ^2.22.1
